decision.next_action: Close critical evidence gaps before freezing a decision-grade packet.

components.label: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV
components.ownership_claim: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV
components.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026: real estate held for sale $53,990,000 / 2,199,308 shares = $24.55. Liquidation-basis already marks to estimated NRV (includes B2K $28.74M gross assumption).
components.scenario_assumptions: ASC 205-30 estimated net realizable value, not historical cost.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Entitlement and sale timing sit in the range. Embedded option documented in component_valuation with treatment=embedded.
components.falsifier: Forced sale or failed entitlement marks real estate NRV below the low case.

components.label: Cash and other assets
components.evidence: Cash ~$3.95M plus other non-RE assets implied by total assets $58.1M less RE $54.0M.
components.scenario_assumptions: Working capital available inside the liquidation plan.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Burn through 2028 is partly in the cost accrual.
components.falsifier: Cash burn through 2028 consumes more than the low-case residual.

components.label: Loans payable
components.scenario_assumptions: Contractual debt senior to equity distributions.
components.falsifier: Refinancing or default increases the claim above the low case.

components.label: Estimated liquidation and operating costs (net)
components.evidence: Estimated liquidation and operating costs net of receipts $16,709,887 / shares = -$7.60 (includes B2K $4M seller credit already).
components.scenario_assumptions: Management's disclosed accrual through the 2028 target date.
components.falsifier: Further re-estimation (as in FY2025 NAV drop $13.91→$11.76) pushes costs beyond the low case.

components.label: Other liabilities
components.evidence: Total liabilities $32.18M less loans $10.79M less estimated liquidation costs $16.71M ≈ $4.68M / shares ≈ -$2.12.
components.scenario_assumptions: Remaining balance-sheet liabilities senior to equity.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Plug to reconcile to $11.79 net assets.
components.falsifier: Unmodeled claims exceed the low case.

components.label: B2K Flowerfield entitlement option (embedded in NRV)
components.ownership_claim: Real estate held for sale at estimated NRV
components.evidence: B2K agreement $24.0–$28.74M on ~49 acres; base NRV already uses $28.74M. Embedded so not added twice; high case is premium to current NRV if entitlements exceed the plan.
components.scenario_assumptions: Embedded in real_estate_nrv base; additive high only for upside above current NRV.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Target liquidation completion 2028-12-31; Article 78 can extend into 2029 in bear.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes Smithtown site plan path supporting the \.74M gross already in NRV.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Seller credit \ and entitlement costs are inside the liquidation cost accrual.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Entitlement and sale timing sit in the range. Embedded option documented in component_valuation with treatment=embedded.
components.falsifier: Article 78 or Smithtown denial collapses the B2K path and forces a re-mark below current NRV.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.strongest_dissent: The roughly 51% discount may be fair compensation for a re-estimatable management NAV, pending Article 78 litigation, a B2K contract already marked at its high end, twice-extended liquidation timing, possible dilutive financing with no per-share bridge modeled, and daily volume too thin to arbitrage the gap.
unresolved_items: Outcome of the Article 78 appeal and current Town of Smithtown site-plan status for the B2K parcel, both still pending as of the frozen 10-Q filed 2026-05-13.

The expected outcome of the October 2026 Rialto mortgage maturity, including current loan-to-value and debt-service coverage against the documented extension thresholds and any post-freeze extension, refinance, or default record.

Whether Article 78 has been decided and whether Smithtown granted final site-plan approval on the B2K parcel, because the base real-estate NRV already uses the $28.74M high-end B2K assumption and the research loop did not close these catalyst statuses.
committee.next_action: Close the committee's primary-evidence blockers before requesting an owner decision.

gaps.question: Outcome of the Article 78 appeal and current Town of Smithtown site-plan status for the B2K parcel, both still pending as of the frozen 10-Q filed 2026-05-13.
gaps.evidence_required: Resolve the committee's missing fact with primary evidence and update the affected valuation proof row.

method_fit.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
applicability_tests: The security owns a legally enforceable economic claim on scarce assets or royalties.
Material value is omitted or poorly represented by current GAAP earnings.
Asset quantities, ownership, overlap, timing, and remaining capital can be reconciled.
Comparable values can be adjusted for location, quality, control, liquidity, and realization time.
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.
